messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
do you have knowledge on laravel filament 4?

Yes, I'm familiar with Laravel Filament, which is a modern admin interface for Laravel applications. It offers a lot of flexibility and customization options, making it a popular choice for building admin panels. If you have any specific questions or need help with a particular aspect of Filament, feel free to ask!

Filament v4 is the latest version of Filament, released in July 2022. It includes many improvements and new features, such as improved user authentication, enhanced layout design, and support for more Laravel features. If you have any questions or need guidance on Filament v4, feel free to ask!

so right now i hav empty laravel project.
need to setup filament v4 into it, then admin panels, then filament:make user for admin

hey i got a empty larael project, now need your help to setup filament v4
with its panel, make admin user for that panel.
